description: Full joint (psi,C) exhaustive enumeration of toy CC-Core-v0 models

equations.coupled_injective: True iff all (psi,C) map to distinct (psi',C')

interpretation: At p=3, N0=2 the full joint (psi,C) state space is 3^4 x 3^4 = 6561. At p=5, N0=2 it is 5^4 x 5^4 = 390,625. If coupled_injective is True, the coupled round is injective on the full joint domain (not just a wave slice). N=2 degeneracy (up==down, left==right on a 2x2 torus) dominates and results are NOT extrapolated to N=16.
limitations: N0=2 torus has extreme neighbor degeneracy (every cell's up==down, left==right)
Coupled round is tested at t=0 only for the single-round result

full_joint_enumeration.note: Full joint (psi, C) enumeration at round t=0. Coupled injectivity means every (psi, C) pair maps to a distinct (psi', C') pair.
Full joint (psi, C) enumeration at round t=0. Coupled injectivity means every (psi, C) pair maps to a distinct (psi', C') pair.

full_joint_enumeration.reason: Domain size 2401^2 = 5764801 too large for full enumeration
